title: rosa tomentosa var. umbelliflora
intro: Rosa tomentosa var. umbelliflora, also known as the Himalayan rose or Rosa tomentosa, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as being used to treat conditions like fever, cough, and respiratory issues. Rosa tomentosa var. umbelliflora is traditionally prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and is also used in folk medicine in various parts of the world.
